name: Baxter, Exzzperimental Zzientist
oracle_text: Creatures named Foot Disciple have flying.
set_name: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles Eternal Tokens
flavor_text: "There is always opportunity to improve your useless minions, Shredder . . . just as you 'improved' me."

name: Bebop, Porcine Punk
oracle_text: Whenever the bosses attack, put a +1/+1 counter on each creature named Foot Disciple.
set_name: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles Eternal Tokens
flavor_text: "Yo, Rock! These dudes got hard candy shells!"

name: Chrome Dome, Cyber-Ninja
oracle_text: Ninjas the bosses control get +1/+0 for each boss in play.
set_name: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles Eternal Tokens
flavor_text: "Do not regret being defeated by me; my design made my victory inevitable."

name: Karai, Shadow Warrior
oracle_text: Whenever a creature the heroes control dies, the heroes lose 1 life.
set_name: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles Eternal Tokens
flavor_text: "A war is coming that will spread from the streets of this city and engulf the entire world."

name: Krang, Dimension X Overlord
oracle_text:
The bosses play an additional card each turn.
At the start of the Boss turn, the bosses lose 2 life.
set_name: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles Eternal Tokens
flavor_text: "Weak words. Weak actions! I have forever known what you fail to understand: Strength . . . Always . . . Prevails!"

name: Leatherhead, Sewer Gator
oracle_text: When this boss enters, the bosses gain 5 life for each boss in play.
set_name: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles Eternal Tokens
flavor_text: "Family? We ain't no family, ya. Monsters got no kin."

name: Rat King, the Chaosbringer
oracle_text: Ninjas the bosses control have deathtouch.
set_name: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles Eternal Tokens
flavor_text: "I am the chaos in the cracks, the vermin in the shadows. Everything fears me . . . everything except the rats."

name: Rocksteady, Rowdy Rhino
oracle_text: Whenever the bosses attack, put a +1/+1 counter on each creature named Foot Disciple.
set_name: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles Eternal Tokens
flavor_text: "Let's crack 'em open and see what kinda goodies are inside!"

name: Savanti Romero, Temporal Rogue
oracle_text: Whenever one or more Ninjas the bosses control deal combat damage to the heroes, the bosses play a card.
set_name: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles Eternal Tokens
flavor_text: "You make it all so easy. Hmm, shall I freeze you in time forever? Devolve you back into four little sea dinosaurs and a monkey? Ooh! Or perhaps primal sludge."

name: Shredder, Foot Clan Overlord
oracle_text: Whenever a creature the bosses control dies, the heroes lose 1 life.
set_name: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles Eternal Tokens
flavor_text: "There is undoubtedly a fascinating story in how my old nemesis came to teach ninjitsu to four mutant turtles . . . perhaps I will let one of you live long enough to tell it!"

name: Slash, the Dark Mirror
oracle_text: Attacking creatures the bosses control have first strike.
set_name: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles Eternal Tokens
flavor_text: "You have a true warrior's spirit, you four, just like me. Except for the part where you hold back!"

name: Event: Baxter's Experiments
oracle_text: Copy the next event the bosses play. (Put this card beside the event deck. After the next event is played, put this card into the event discard pile.)
set_name: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles Eternal Tokens
flavor_text: "I suppose this is where I should be feeling pity . . ."

name: Event: Bebop's Rampage
oracle_text: Bebop's Rampage deals 2 damage to each creature the heroes control.
set_name: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles Eternal Tokens
flavor_text: "Definitely feels good to be on the winning side of a beatdown."

name: Event: Chrome Dome's Overload
oracle_text: Each hero sacrifices a tapped creature they control.
set_name: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles Eternal Tokens
flavor_text: "Threat detected. Eliminate."

name: Event: Karai's Planning
oracle_text: The heroes lose 3 life and the bosses gain 3 life.
set_name: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles Eternal Tokens
flavor_text: "The future belongs to those who can take it."

name: Event: Krang's Stratagem
oracle_text: As a team, the heroes discard a total of two cards.
set_name: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles Eternal Tokens
flavor_text: "I don't know how you found your way into my war . . . but I promise you will rue the day you chose to oppose me."

name: Event: Leatherhead's Smackdown
oracle_text: As a team, the heroes choose a creature with the greatest power among creatures they control. Destroy it. The bosses lose life equal to that creature's power.
set_name: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles Eternal Tokens
flavor_text: "Think you can take on the apex predator o' dese parts? I dun think so, ya."

name: Event: Rat King's Revolution
oracle_text: Each hero taps a creature they control and puts X stun counters on it, where X is the number of bosses. (If a permanent with a stun counter would become untapped, remove one from it instead.)
set_name: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles Eternal Tokens
flavor_text: "The road we all trod—well, that you all trod—has one and only one destination."

name: Event: Rocksteady's Beatdown
oracle_text: Destroy all creatures with flying the heroes control.
set_name: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles Eternal Tokens
flavor_text: "We wanna go bigger! We want the next fight to be freak against freak."

name: Event: Savanti Romero's Curse
oracle_text: Each hero returns X creatures they control to their owners' hands, where X is the number of bosses.
set_name: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles Eternal Tokens
flavor_text:
"You shall be forever stuck in the confines of time."
—Savanti Romero

name: Event: Shredder's Challenge
oracle_text: Return two Ninja cards at random from the boss graveyard to the battlefield under the Boss team's control. (If there's only one, return it to the battlefield.)
set_name: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles Eternal Tokens
flavor_text: "Yes, come forward! Attack me if you will. When it is over, you will call me Master!"

name: Event: Slash's Smash
oracle_text: Destroy all Turtles.
set_name: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles Eternal Tokens
flavor_text: "If you're gonna be free, you need to lose some dead weight . . ."

name: Event: Villain Infiltration
oracle_text: As a team, the heroes choose a creature with the greatest power among creatures they control. Destroy it.
set_name: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles Eternal Tokens
flavor_text: "Ninjas. Vanish!"

name: Event: Villain Mayhem!
oracle_text: As a team, the heroes choose three creatures they control. Destroy each other creature the heroes control.
set_name: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles Eternal Tokens
flavor_text:
"We will destroy EVERYTHING!"
—Bebop & Rocksteady

name: Event: Villain Scheme!
oracle_text: Shuffle this card and the boss graveyard into the boss library.
set_name: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles Eternal Tokens
flavor_text:
"No underling will ever consider me to be only as strong as my armor. And no one will stand in my way."
—Krang

name: Foot Skirmisher
oracle_text:
Flying (This creature can't be blocked except by creatures with flying or reach.)
This creature can't block.
set_name: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles Eternal Tokens
flavor_text: A ninja's deadliest strike can come from anywhere, even from above.

name: Foot Disciple
oracle_text: This creature can't block.
set_name: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles Eternal Tokens
flavor_text: The Shredder demands much of the Foot ninjas, and few live up to his expectations. However, their masks do more than hide their identity; they hide a brutal turnover rate.

name: Foot Enforcer
oracle_text:
This creature can't block.
This creature can't be blocked by more than one creature.
set_name: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles Eternal Tokens
flavor_text: Ultimately, all the Foot require of their enemies is fear. When stealth fails, strength will suffice.
